reviews.review_description:
For the moment this app is disappointing, both in its content, its music, its effects, its menu. The promises are far from being kept.
However, we can hope that it will develop quickly.
The idea of ​​having a music visualizer is very cool in itself. Just missing the execution to match.
My wishes :
1) The app must react to the music in the room you are in using the headset microphone itself.
2) The app must allow you to add and react to your own music loaded into the headset. The app must react to music whatever the source, internet, youtube, etc...
3) Visually, it would be good if we could interact "physically" with the generated images. For example disrupting the passage of waves, moving, enlarging the "sun" etc...
4) Being able to create a playlist that plays continuously
5) Add content, really lots of content, effects and music
6) Add mini music games to make the experience more fun and interactive. Add interactivity.
7) Suggest moving from MR to a full VR environment
8) Reverse the principle by creating music by playing the laser harp like Jean-Michel Jarre for example

Dear developers :
I hope you will take my remarks as constructive comments. I am not asking for a refund because I clearly want to support your project. 
My comments are there to help you. As is, it is unfortunately very insufficient, but I am sure that you will be able to raise this app to the top.
Good luck and lots of success for 2024.

developer_response.body: Thanks a million for such a detailed comment, it contains a lot of useful and important suggestions that we have already sent to the development team. We are truly grateful for your desire to help us and for your supportive wishes! Best wishes to you:)

reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed the variety of effects! Devs promised that there will be even more of them. This is very fascinating, especially for such a low price, I’m willing to pay more
Fantastic effects! I’m waiting for more and I would like to offer many of my ideas! I hope this can be done in your discord channel, I will be glad to help
Impressive! This music visualizer is truly innovative. Kudos to the team for such a bomb idea. Excited to explore more!

Is it realy live interacting with the music  or this  videos are prerendered with music ?
To use the own misic us not realized therfore its not realy usable and rhe number of effects is low .
For the at the moment existing functions its to expensive

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! In the near future we will introduce a microphone option, allowing users to incorporate their own audio into the experience. Furthermore, there will be interaction with effects, enhancing the overall immersive experience. Also we're working on new effects! We would be grateful if you increase the number of stars after our updates:)

reviews.review_description: The best music visualizer I’ve seen so far. Effex looks really promising like it’s from the future! The visuals sync perfectly with the music to create magic, I recommend it for sure

WOW I’ve never seen anything like this before! I can say that the idea with a music visualizer is just a BOMB
Cool guys, keep it up! I want to check out more
I will follow the development of this app avidly, really impressed with the content that is already available.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! Stay tuned for more exciting updates, and thank you for being an integral part of our journey:)

reviews.review_description:
I love the music effects and the idea. It takes advantage of mixed reality and it feel really cool like you are in a solo club or something like that. 

My suggestions to the developers:

Remove the boundary limits or guardian zones on the quest because you want to move around the effects and observe it from different angles in the room 

Allow to integrate and work seamlessly with other music platforms example is You tube music and you would have the best experience 

Looking for ward to more updates

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for your suggestions and kind words! We're glad to know you enjoy Effex and will keep improving our app:)

reviews.review_description: You surprised me very much! An unexpected but very cool release. Now I can say that it was not in vain that I bought Quest 3, because it is a very interesting experience in mixed reality. I would like to see more of this, whoever came up with this idea is simply talented

there is a huge lack of music visualiser apps on quest. this fills that hole! it's still somewhat basic, with only a few visualisations in it, and you can't use your own music yet - but all of this is in the works, so this is only a sliver of what it will be in the future! i'm excited for what this will become. 

what *is* already here is mesmerizing and fun to watch and experience. the UI is also really nice, the way you choose your visualiser and the way you can control the brightness of the passthrough. which by the way, it's like a lighting dimmer, you can turn it gradually from 100% all the way to about 10%. you can choose to make your room very dark so that the lights of the visualisers stand out even more. the effect is really pretty!

consider this app like an Early Access title. get it while it's still cheap!
